parameters.content:
## Section 1: Health Monitor -- Every 30 minutes
Checks pipeline health. Discord alert only when RED/CRITICAL detected. Silent when healthy.

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-health 2>&1
docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-stats summary 2>&1
docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job academic_ingest 2>&1
docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job reddit_polymarket 2>&1
docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job blog_ingest 2>&1

parameters.content: ## Section 5: YouTube Pipeline -- Weekly Mon 04:00 UTC

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job youtube_ingest 2>&1

parameters.content: ## Section 6: GitHub Pipeline -- Weekly Wed 04:00 UTC

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job github_ingest 2>&1

parameters.content: ## Section 7: Freshness Pipeline -- Weekly Sun 02:00 UTC

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job freshness_refresh 2>&1

parameters.content:
## Section 8: Weekly Digest -- Sunday 08:00 UTC
Generates report + stats, sends to Discord.

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-report digest --window 7 2>&1
docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-stats summary 2>&1

parameters.content:
## Section 9: URL Ingestion -- POST /webhook/ris-ingest
POST with {"url": "...", "source_family": "..."}
